actions.intent: Take a safe opener while preserving the shared choke read.
Open the lower target side and set up the shared lane.
Stabilize dock before committing deeper into the choke.
Open the upper target side without overworking crates.
Use lower board material to keep the dock controlled.
Break the key ice in the shared choke.
Use the opened frozen lane to extract the lower puppy.
Keep pressure under control during the pivot.
Cash a dock clear before the final rescue.
Finish the upper route and extract the second puppy.

notes: Designer golden for the ice choke variation: open the shared ice lane, rescue lower target, then pivot through the same lane.
